---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with the skill workflow
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened?

A clear description of the bug.

## What did you expect?

What should have happened instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Trigger phrase used: "..."
2. Step in the workflow where it broke: (e.g., Step 3 — Generate Screens)
3. What Claude Code did vs. what it should have done

## Environment

- Claude Code version:
- MCP servers connected: (Stitch, 21st.dev, etc.)
- Project type: (React, Vue, vanilla HTML/CSS, etc.)

## Additional context

Any screenshots, logs, or other details that help explain the issue.
